Why the illustration at the top? I have a PhD. in queueing, and I work with Linux, which has a penguin as a brand character.

Pages

  • Bio: Some sort of C.V.
  • Books: technical books that I like in particular.
  • French stuff: Podcats and youtube channels in French.
  • Posts: Posts I wrote on maths and coding.
  • Presentations: Some general presentations to demonstrate reveal (just useful for me).
  • Tools: software tools that I use all the time.
  • Sites: Useful (mostly for me).

Courses

I keep all material for my courses on github.
